title: AS 4100:2020 Weld Group Capacity
description: Design weld groups in accordance with AS 4100:2020.

t_w.description: tw. Symbol: t_w. Units: mm. Leg length of weld. Note preffered sizes of fillet weld less than 15 mm are 3, 4, 5, 6, 8, 10 and 12 mm.

t_t.description: tt. Symbol: t_t. Units: mm. Throat thickness of weld (tw / √2)

t_m1.description: tm1. Symbol: t_{m1}. Units: mm. Thickness of Member 1.

t_m2.description: tm2. Symbol: t_{m2}. Units: mm. Thickness of Member 2.

f_uw.description: fuw. Symbol: f_{uw}. Units: MPa. Nominal tensile strength of weld metal (see AS4100:2020 table 9.6.3.10). 410 and 480 are also provided to allow users to check weld designed with 1998 (and older) versions of the standard, however should not be used for new designs.

category.description: Weld Category. Symbol: \text{Weld Category}. General Purpose (GP) welds have less stringent requirements and are conservative for design since they have a lower capacity factor (0.6). Structural Purpose (SP) welds are however still more common for structural applications and have a higher reduction factor (typically 0.8).

shape.description: Shape. Symbol: Shape. Select shape of section to be imported to weld geometry. Sections will be automatically updated after shape dropdown is selected.

section.description: Section. Symbol: Section. Select section to be added to the weld geometry. You must click 'Add Section' in order to add the section to the geometry.

x_offset.description: X. Units: mm. The X offset.

y_offset.description: Y. Units: mm. The Y offset.

rotate.description: Section Rotation (↷). Rotation for section to import. Rotation is clockwise ↷.

horizontal_welds.description: Horizontal Welds. Coordinates of all horizontal line welds in the weld group to be considered.

vertical_welds.description: Vertical Welds. Coordinates of all vertical line welds in the weld group to be considered.

Fx.description: Fx. Symbol: F_x. Units: kN. Applied Design Action Along x-axis.

Fy.description: Fy. Symbol: F_y. Units: kN. Applied Design Action Along y-axis.

Fz.description: Fz. Symbol: F_z. Units: kN. Applied Design Action Along z-axis.

Mx.description: Mx. Symbol: M_x. Units: kN-m. Design Moment About x-axis.

My.description: My. Symbol: M_y. Units: kN-m. Design Moment About y-axis.

Mz.description: Mz. Symbol: M_z. Units: kN-m. Design Moment About z-axis.

graph_on.description: Show Stress Graphs. Toggle on/off to show stress graphs in reporting. Disabling stress graphs will result in quicker solve times.

uid.description: Calculator unique identifier — must match the endpoint uid.

current_unit_system.description: Unit system for input values and output display.

project_details.description: Optional project metadata for the PDF report header.
